content.en:
With the leak of the news of the Eternal Flint Stone, some of the Ninefold Origin Ancestors who are qualified to impact the Supreme Force are all moved!

If they obtain the Eternal Flint Stone, maybe it won't be long before they become the Strongest Ninefold Ancestor, ranking at the pinnacle of the Silent Black Sea, and they belong to the strongest batch!

And the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor is qualified to impact the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor, but he has failed several times, and this shackle is too difficult to break!

"It's a pity that the eternal flint is in the hands of the shadow stone of the boulder tribe, even if the strength of the shadow stone is weaker than me, but it will not be too weak, and the other party has the eternal flint, and it is still cutting off the forbidden area, the other party has the ability to save his life in the flame area of the forbidden area, but I can't save my life, if I go there, I will also fall!"

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor said helplessly.

Judging from the current situation, there is no way he can take the Eternal Flint from Shadowstone!

Unless Shadowstone comes out of the Cutoff Zone, then he will have a chance!

But once the shadow stone comes out, there is no need for him to do it, and the Supreme Ninefold Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building will do it.

......

Cut off the exclusion zone.

Inside the Endless Flame Zone, a fiery red figure was cultivating in a volcano, his body constantly absorbing a mysterious substance inside this volcano, and his strength was increasing at a very slow rate.

And he is the Shadow Stone of the Boulder Tribe.

"It's still a little short of the limit of the chemical level, it's useless for me here, and I have to find resources again!"

Shadowstone muttered.

Abrupt.

A pair of terrifying eyes covered the area, staring at him.

"Oh no, it's been found again!"

Shadow Stone's face changed drastically, and he immediately urged the power of the Eternal Fire Stone to cover his existence, and then quickly fled.

Rumble!!!!

The volcano was reduced to ashes, and the surrounding area was shattered.

Shadow Stone didn't know who the owner of these eyes was, nor had he seen the other party's true body, but he knew that the other party's strength was definitely comparable to the Supreme Enhancement level, and even more terrifying than the ordinary Supreme Enhancement level.

If he faced this mysterious creature, he was afraid that he would not be able to support a few moves.

Therefore, every time he is discovered by the other party, he will choose to escape.

However, he didn't know if he would be able to escape every time, and if he didn't, he would be dead!

"It's too dangerous to cut off the forbidden area, even the strongest people of the Silent Black Sea don't dare to come in, I may fall here at any time, I must raise my cultivation to the extreme of the transformation level as soon as possible and then break through to the strengthening level!"

Shadowstone kept running away, but the eyes seemed to lock on him, and they kept following it.

Shadowstone has been through this situation several times, so it's no stranger.

He felt that he still had a good chance of escaping, and then hiding.

However, this time it was unexpected.

The other party seemed to want to catch up with him completely, and he never gave up.

"Damn, this mysterious creature won't really come in!"

Shadowstone panicked.

All along, he thought that the other party's body was afraid that it was in a special place and there was no way to leave, so he dealt with him in the air.

But this time, he was a little skeptical that the other party really couldn't come.

But soon, he was dumbfounded.

Rumble!!!!

Another pair of eyes appeared, locking on him.

At this moment, he felt that he really couldn't avoid it.

"Two creature to the strength level!"

Shadowstone was terrified.

He felt that he couldn't stay here any longer, and that he had to get out immediately, or else he might really fall this time!

It is not easy to leave from the Interception Forbidden Zone, and he must find the weak point of the barrier so that he can break time and space in one fell swoop and leave the Interception Forbidden Zone.

"There are no weak points of space-time barriers here, and with their interference, I can't leave!"

Shadowstone had no choice but to flee.

He had no direction at all, so he could only flee haphazardly.

Even if the two beings comparable to the enhancement level attacked him from the air, the power was extremely terrifying.

Soon, Shadowstone is injured!

This moment.

Shadowstone has only one idea, and that is to escape this area of fire first!

He also has a certain understanding of the Truncated Forbidden Zone, such as the Truncated Forbidden Zone is divided into many special areas, and the creatures in each area have their own territory.

If he had fled to other areas, the two mysterious creatures would never have pursued him, and then he would have had any hope of escaping.

In this way, Shadowstone kept fleeing, and finally saw another area.

"The front should be the Soul Splitting Red Light Area, the Soul Splitting Red Light Area is relatively weak, if I go there, the danger should be the lightest, and those two mysterious creatures should not chase them in!"

Shadowstone muttered.

The only problem is that the Eternal Flint can guarantee that he will not be harmed by the flames here in the Flame Zone, but if he goes to the Soul Breaker Red Light area, he will not be able to protect himself, and will therefore be corrupted by the Soul Breaker Red Light.

As a result, his combat power in the Soul Breaker Red Light region will be damaged.

However, he can't manage so much, it's better than the current situation!

Finally, Shadowstone escaped into the Soul Breaker Red Light area at the cost of heavy damage.

And at the moment when he fled, he heard a roar.

Moreover, he also saw two extremely terrifying mountain phantoms appear, and there was even a huge face on the mountain.

"The creatures of the mountains are somewhat similar to the tribesmen of the Giant Mountain Tribe, but these are real creatures, not primordial antiquities!"

Shadowstone thought to himself.

He was relieved that the two mysterious creatures hadn't pursued them.

Now, he needs to find a safe place to heal, otherwise it will be too bad if he encounters danger again after getting out of here!

......

Ye Tian had been looking for resources in the Soul Splitting Red Light area, and even collected Soul Splitting Red Crystals by the way.

But on this day, he sensed the existence of a primordial artifact.

"Hey, how can there be an original antiquity here, and it's such a terrifying original antiquity!!"

Ye Tian didn't perceive the other party, and only used the copying talent to observe.

Judging from the situation of the investigation, the other party should be a primordial artifact of the transformation level, but he is not clear about the specific level of the transformation level.

But the appearance of a primordial antiquity powerhouse here is not normal in itself.

"I can't get close to each other, otherwise I'll definitely be killed. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

When he returned to the Soul Breaker Red Beast's lair, he found that the Soul Breaker Red Beasts were launching his command to search for an outsider.

Ye Tian knew that he must have searched for that primordial artifact, so he reported his discovery.

After a while, a group of Transformation-level Soul Splitting Red Beasts passed.

"It's time to watch the show!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
